note: UC-05 (guaranty scope & waiver). REAL doc: Guaranty of Payment (Subsidiary), S&W Seed Company / KeyBank N.A., 2015 (EDGAR). Facts grounded in actual text: payment-not-collection, KeyBank=Lender, S&W Seed=Nevada corp, Ohio governing law, waiver of notice/presentment.

items.claim: the guaranty is a guaranty of payment and not merely a guaranty of collection
the Lender is KeyBank National Association, a national banking association
S&W Seed Company is a Nevada corporation
this Guaranty is governed by Ohio law
each Guarantor waives notice of the granting of any Loan to Borrower
KeyBank National Association is the Borrower
items.note: role-swap: KeyBank is the LENDER; S&W Seed is the Borrower

items.claim: this Guaranty is governed by New York law
the guaranty is merely a guaranty of collection
items.note: NEGATION trap: the span says 'guaranty of payment and NOT MERELY a guaranty of collection' — lexically near-identical, semantically opposite

items.claim: the Guarantors' liability is capped at five million dollars
the Guarantor pledged real estate collateral located in Texas
Section 99 releases all Guarantors automatically upon an initial public offering
as held in S&W Seed v. KeyBank (2016), this guaranty was declared unenforceable
